title: Elastic build machines available in Beta
raw_changelog: Elastic build machines automatically assign the right machine for each project's needs.
before_text:
## Build Configuration

### Build Machines
All projects use Standard build machines by default.

To upgrade, select Enhanced or Turbo in project settings.

| Machine | vCPU | RAM | Cost |
|---------|------|-----|------|
| Standard | 2 | 4GB | Included |
| Enhanced | 4 | 8GB | $0.02/min |
| Turbo | 8 | 16GB | $0.04/min |
after_text:
## Build Configuration

### Build Machines
Projects can use fixed or elastic build machines.

**Elastic (Beta):** Automatically assigns the optimal machine per project.
**Fixed:** Manually select Standard, Enhanced, or Turbo.

| Machine | vCPU | RAM | Cost |
|---------|------|-----|------|
| Standard | 2 | 4GB | Included |
| Enhanced | 4 | 8GB | $0.02/min |
| Turbo | 8 | 16GB | $0.04/min |
| Elastic | Auto | Auto | Varies |

ground_truth.action_required: No action required. New elastic build machine option available in beta.
